narrative:
Peninsula Vill (precinct in Summit County) has 417 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.5%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.7 percentage points.
